bead.title: Tenant-aware MCP endpoints and resource URIs per CONTRACT-003
bead.description: CONTRACT-003 (docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-mcp-surface.md) requires tenant-aware forms for MCP HTTP endpoints and resource URIs, consistent with ADR-018 path-based routing. Current MCP surface (crates/axon-mcp, crates/axon-server/src/mcp_http.rs) does not expose the tenant-aware forms. Add them and align resource URI templates.
bead.acceptance: MCP HTTP endpoint is mounted under the tenant-prefixed path form named in CONTRACT-003; resource URIs returned by resources/list use the tenant-aware template; MCP contract tests (crates/axon-server/tests/mcp_contract.rs, mcp_intents_contract.rs) assert the tenant-aware forms and pass.
